editions.lead_headline: Walmart Cracks Open CTV Data, Routes VIZIO Audiences To Yahoo DSP
editions.lead_dek: Magnite-piped integration ends single-DSP exclusivity on Walmart's first-party shoppers and brings closed-loop sales to a second buying surface.

editions.lead_headline: PubMatic Names MiQ Among First Partners In AI-In-The-Auction Layer
editions.lead_dek: Decision Fabric lets approved buy-side models run as Docker containers inside AgenticOS bid requests, returning segment IDs in under ten milliseconds.
